messages.content:
もぉ～お兄ちゃんいつになって帰ってくるの～？

translate english 5 options

1. "Geez, big brother, when are you going to come back?"
2. "Ugh, when will you return, big brother?"
3. "Seriously, big bro, when are you coming back?"
4. "Oh come on, big brother, when are you returning?"
5. "Man, when are you coming home, big brother?"

トレっち出かけたばっかだよ

translate english 5 options

1. "He just went out for a bit."
2. "He's only just left for a walk."
3. "He just stepped out for a little while."
4. "He's recently gone out for a stroll."
5. "He only left a moment ago for a walk."

皆に良いお知らせがあるんだけど。。。

translate english 5 options

1. "I've got some good news for everyone..."
2. "There's some good news I have for everyone..."
3. "I have good news for everybody..."
4. "I've got something good to tell everyone..."
5. "There's great news I want to share with everyone..."

さっき商店街で取った温泉旅行券だよ

translate english 5 options

1. "It's the hot spring trip voucher I got at the shopping district earlier."
2. "I got a hot spring travel coupon at the shopping street just now."
3. "It's the onsen trip ticket I picked up in the shopping arcade earlier."
4. "I snagged a hot spring vacation voucher at the shopping district just before."
5. "This is the hot spring journey coupon I acquired at the shopping area a little while ago."

皆に良いお知らせがあるんだけど。。。

さっき商店街で取った温泉旅行券だよ

translate english 5 options

1. "I have some good news for everyone... It's the hot spring trip voucher I got at the shopping district earlier."
2. "There's great news for everyone... I snagged a hot spring travel coupon in the shopping street just now."
3. "I've got something wonderful to tell everybody... It's an onsen trip ticket I picked up in the shopping arcade earlier."
4. "Got some good news for you all... This is the hot spring vacation voucher I acquired at the shopping district a little while ago."
5. "I've got good news for everyone... It's the hot spring journey coupon I managed to get from the shopping area earlier."

トレっち～ヴイブロス温泉行きたいな。。。

translate english 5 options

1. "Tre-kun~ I want to go to the Veebros hot spring..."
2. "Tre-kun~ I'd love to visit the Veebros hot spring..."
3. "Tre-kun~ I'm longing to go to the Veebros hot spring..."
4. "Tre-kun~ How I wish we could go to the Veebros hot spring..."
5. "Tre-kun~ It would be great to head to the Veebros hot spring..."

トレっち～ヴイブロス温泉行きたいな。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Tre~ I wanna go to Veebros hot springs..."
2. "Hey Tre~ Feel like hitting up Veebros hot springs..."
3. "Yo Tre~ How 'bout we jet off to Veebros hot springs..."
4. "Tre, dude~ Really wanna check out Veebros hot springs..."
5. "Tre~ Got a craving to soak at Veebros hot springs..."

Person1:トレっち～ヴイブロス温泉行きたいな。。。

Person2: お兄ちゃん。。。カレンも行きたい。。。

translate this conversation english 5 options informal

1. Person1: "Tre~ Really wanna go to Veebros hot springs..."
   Person2: "Big bro... Karen wants to go too..."

2. Person1: "Hey Tre~ Thinking about hitting Veebros hot springs..."
   Person2: "Brother... Karen's keen on going as well..."

3. Person1: "Yo Tre~ Feel like soaking in Veebros hot springs..."
   Person2: "Big brother... Count Karen in too..."

4. Person1: "Tre, my man~ Wanna check out Veebros hot springs..."
   Person2: "Big bro... Karen's itching to go too..."

5. Person1: "Tre~ I'm down for some Veebros hot springs action..."
   Person2: "Bro... Karen's all for it too..."

I wanna go to an onsen aswell...  

10 variations

1. "I'm also itching to hit up an onsen..."
2. "I too wish to soak in an onsen..."
3. "I've got a craving to visit an onsen as well..."
4. "I'm keen on going to an onsen myself..."
5. "I'm also yearning for an onsen getaway..."
6. "I'd also love to take a dip in an onsen..."
7. "I'm eager to experience an onsen too..."
8. "Count me in for an onsen trip as well..."
9. "I'd be down for an onsen adventure myself..."
10. "Going to an onsen sounds good to me too..."

I really wanna go too... Onii-chan.

10 variations

1. "I really wanna go as well... Onii-chan."
2. "I'm so eager to join, too... Onii-chan."
3. "I'd seriously love to come along... Onii-chan."
4. "I've been dying to go too... Onii-chan."
5. "I'm super keen on going as well... Onii-chan."
6. "I also have a strong desire to go... Onii-chan."
7. "I'm also dreaming of going... Onii-chan."
8. "I, too, wish to be part of the trip... Onii-chan."
9. "I've got a real urge to go too... Onii-chan."
10. "It's my wish to join in as well... Onii-chan."

ねぇカレンも一緒につれってって～

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Hey, take Karen along too~"
2. "Yo, let Karen come with as well~"
3. "Aww, bring Karen along too, will ya~"
4. "Hey, don't forget to include Karen too~"
5. "C'mon, let Karen tag along as well~"

絶対お兄ちゃんに迷惑かけないから

translate english 5 options informal

1. "I promise I won't be a bother to big bro at all."
2. "Swear I won't trouble you, big brother."
3. "I'll absolutely not get in big bro's way."
4. "Guaranteed, I won't be any trouble to big brother."
5. "I won't cause any hassle for you, onii-chan, promise."

ヴイブロスも温泉でリラックスしたい～ねぇトレっちお願い～

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Veebros wants to relax in the hot springs too~ Please, Tre-kun~"
2. "I wanna chill at the onsen with Veebros~ C'mon Tre, please~"
3. "Veebros is itching for some hot spring relaxation too~ Hey Tre, pretty please~"
4. "Veebros needs some onsen downtime as well~ Please, Tre-kun~"
5. "I'm dreaming of unwinding in the onsen, Veebros style~ Tre, be a dear, please~"

三人分あるよ

団体コースだから。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Got enough for three people."
   "It's a group package, after all..."

2. "There's space for three of us."
   "Since it's a group deal and all..."

3. "We've got three spots."
   "It's a group course, you know..."

4. "Enough for all three."
   "Given it's a group plan..."

5. "Three can go, no problem."
   "It's tailored for groups, so..."

せっかくの二人きりチャンスだと思ったのに。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "And here I was thinking we'd have a rare chance to be alone together..."
2. "Thought we were getting a special chance to be just the two of us, but no..."
3. "I kinda hoped it'd be our shot at some alone time..."
4. "Was thinking this was our moment to be alone together, but guess not..."
5. "Had it in my head we'd get some one-on-one time, but oh well..."

でもヴイブロスちゃんも放っておかないし。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "But I can't just leave Veebros-chan hanging either..."
2. "Still, wouldn't feel right to ignore Veebros-chan..."
3. "But then again, can't just ditch Veebros-chan, can I..."
4. "Though, can’t really leave Veebros-chan out in the cold..."
5. "Yet, it's not like I can ignore Veebros-chan either..."

攻め時は。。。もうちょうと後になるかな。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Guess the right time to make a move is... just a bit further down the line, huh?"
2. "Looks like the perfect time to go for it... might be a little later then."
3. "The time to strike... probably gonna have to wait a bit longer, huh?"
4. "Seems like the moment to make my move... is still a little ways off, maybe?"
5. "Thinking the best shot I've got... is gonna be a bit more of a wait, yeah?"

それにヴィブロスちゃんの。。。お兄ちゃんへの気持ちも気になる。。。

translate english 5 options informal

1. "Plus, I'm kinda curious about Veebros-chan's... feelings towards big bro..."
2. "Also, kinda wondering about what Veebros-chan... thinks of big brother..."
3. "And I'm a bit nosy about Veebros-chan's... vibe towards big bro, ya know..."
4. "On top of that, I'm sorta intrigued by Veebros-chan's... feelings for big brother..."
5. "Besides, Veebros-chan's... sentiment towards big bro has me curious..."

ngl, since i dont use the site, im not completely sure, i'm kinda just parroting what someone else said about the site. 

grammar check

Your sentence is clear and understandable, but it could be slightly refined for clarity and formality, if desired. Here's a slightly revised version:

"NGL, since I don't use the site myself, I'm not completely sure; I'm essentially just repeating what someone else mentioned about the site."

This revision retains the original meaning while improving flow and punctuation for readability.
